_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: Y100 treatment does not result in accumulation of lipidated LC3B (LC3B-II)...These data were recapitulated by immunofluorescent microscopy of p62 and LC3B in Y100 treated U87-MG cells
details: Successfully detected that Y100 treatment does not result in accumulation of lipidated LC3B (LC3-II), distinguishing it from autophagy inhibitor hydroxychloroquine
